query: SELECT id, title, due_week FROM bambina_checklist WHERE due_week IN (20, 22, 24, 26, 39, 40) ORDER BY due_week, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RXsnsHaxFXFzWXK.root --database TGNsMbsGdWXQhRmCtYbG6q --execute SELECT id, title, due_week FROM bambina_checklist WHERE due_week IN (20, 22, 24, 26, 39, 40) ORDER BY due_week, id;
